"Iran-Israel war" is not the proper name of the war. Hence lowercase "war". This was decided on the talk page. Since it is not the proper name, it should not be treated as if it were and bolded. This also leads to an absurd redundancy: the Israel-Iran war was a war between Israel and Iran.
